resultList.dtldesc: Explore a promising opportunity with this 2 BHK flat for sale in Sriperumbudur, Chennai. Offering comfortable living spaces in a rapidly developing area, this property is ideal for both investors and homebuyers seeking modern amenities and convenience in Chennai's expanding landscape.::::::::Property Specifications::::::::Located on the 2nd floor of a well-maintained building, this Vastu-compliant 2 BHK flat in Sriperumbudur, Chennai offers a harmonious living environment with the main entrance facing west. The spacious living room and two bedrooms, semi-furnished for comfort, provide ample space for relaxation and entertainment.::::::::The flat boasts three balconies, enhancing natural light and ventilation: one facing east from the living room, one south-facing balcony attached to the master bedroom, and another south-facing balcony connected to the kitchen. The kitchen is equipped with granite flooring, a stainless steel sink, and open shelves for storage convenience.::::::::Two western-style bathrooms cater to practical needs, with one attached to the master bedroom featuring a washbasin, western closet, and geyser, and the other serving as a common bathroom also equipped with a western closet and geyser. Both bathrooms include shower cubicles for added comfort.::::::::The apartment is fitted with essential electrical fixtures such as lights and fans, ensuring immediate usability. Modern light fixtures further enhance the ambience in the hall, bedrooms, and kitchen, complementing the vitrified tile flooring throughout.::::::::Facilities::::::::Residents enjoy access to common amenities including a park, sewage treatment plant (STP), and community hall, with provisions for future facilities like a gym, supermarket, and doctor's clinic. A dedicated covered parking space accommodates two bikes alongside cars, while security measures include CCTV installation for enhanced safety.::::::::Locality::::::::The property offers convenient proximity to Mahaveer Ashray Cancer Hospital (500 meters), Guruvayoorappan Temple (600 meters), and Sri Ramanujar Temple (3.5 kilometers), ensuring access to healthcare and spiritual centers. Sriperumbudur Bus Stand is 3.5 kilometers away, and Tiruvallur Railway Station is within 17 kilometers. ::::::::Public transport options are abundant, with buses running in front of the flat, and the upcoming Chennai Bangalore High-Speed Highway adds to the area's connectivity and future prospects.
